templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.description.vi: Định nghĩa chính sách theo thuộc tính subject × resource × action × condition.
templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.description.en: Define a policy by subject × resource × action × condition attributes.
templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.description.ja: subject × resource × action × condition の属性でポリシーを定義します。
templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.description.ko: subject × resource × action × condition 속성으로 정책을 정의합니다.
templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.description.zh: 按 subject × resource × action × condition 属性定义策略。

templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.namePlacehol.vi: Ví dụ: Chỉ Finance HCM xem revenue confidential
templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.namePlacehol.en: Example: Only Finance HCM can view confidential revenue
templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.namePlacehol.ja: 例:Finance HCMのみがconfidentialなrevenueを閲覧可能
templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.namePlacehol.ko: 예: Finance HCM만 confidential revenue 조회 가능
templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.namePlacehol.zh: 示例：仅 Finance HCM 可查看 confidential 的 revenue

templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.descPlacehol.vi: Khi nào áp dụng, vì sao

templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.noConditions.vi: Không có điều kiện — áp dụng cho mọi {scope}.
templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.noConditions.ja: 条件なし — すべての{scope}に適用されます。
templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.noConditions.zh: 无条件 — 适用于所有{scope}。

templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.denyOverride.ja: DENYは常にALLOWより優先されます

templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.denyOverride.vi: trong Hybrid PDP. Policy không có condition = áp dụng cho mọi subject/resource.
templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.denyOverride.en: in Hybrid PDP. A policy with no condition applies to every subject/resource.
templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.denyOverride.ja: (ハイブリッドPDP内)。conditionのないポリシーはすべてのsubject/resourceに適用されます。
templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.denyOverride.ko: (하이브리드 PDP 내). condition이 없는 정책은 모든 subject/resource에 적용됩니다.
templates70AuthzAbacBuilder.denyOverride.zh: (混合 PDP 中)。没有 condition 的策略适用于所有 subject/resource。
